title: 多任务并发队列
summary: asyncio并发处理多条消息 + 任务队列管理
trigger_pattern: 并发 多任务 队列 asyncio concurrent task queue
template_code:
_tasks: dict[str, asyncio.Task] = {}
async def enqueue(coro, tid):
    task = asyncio.create_task(coro)
    _tasks[tid] = task
    task.add_done_callback(lambda t: _tasks.pop(tid, None))
code_snippet:
_tasks: dict[str, asyncio.Task] = {}
async def enqueue(coro, tid):
    task = asyncio.create_task(coro)
    _tasks[tid] = task
    task.add_done_callback(lambda t: _tasks.pop(tid, None))
